outputs.main.sas:
library(rtables)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(haven)
library(rtf)

# Read ADSL dataset
adsl <- read_sas("adsl.sas7bdat")  # Adjust path as needed

# Filter to All Screened population (SAFFL == "Y" or similar)
# Assuming SAFFL indicates screened population; adjust if different
adsl_screened <- adsl %>% filter(SAFFL == "Y")

# Define treatment groups in order
adsl_screened <- adsl_screened %>%
  mutate(TRT01AN = factor(TRT01AN, levels = c(0, 54, 81),
                          labels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low", "Xanomeline High")))

# Create screening summary data
# 1. Screening counts
screening_counts <- adsl_screened %>%
  group_by(TRT01AN) %>%
  summarise(
    Screened = n(),
    Screen_Failure = sum(DCREASON == "Screen Failure", na.rm = TRUE),
    Enrolled = sum(DCREASON != "Screen Failure" | is.na(DCREASON), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 2. Screen failure reasons (assuming DCSREAS contains reason)
screen_fail_reasons <- adsl_screened %>%
  filter(DCREASON == "Screen Failure") %>%
  group_by(TRT01AN, DCSREAS) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(TRT01AN, DCSREAS, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01AN, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

# 3. Enrollment summary (assuming ENRLFL indicates enrolled)
enrollment_summary <- adsl_screened %>%
  group_by(TRT01AN) %>%
  summarise(
    Enrolled = sum(ENRLFL == "Y", na.rm = TRUE),
    Not_Enrolled = sum(ENRLFL != "Y" | is.na(ENRLFL), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Build table using rtables
# Create basic table structure
lyt <- basic_table(title = "Table 14-1.01: Screening Summary",
                   subtitles = "All Screened Population") %>%
  split_cols_by("TRT01AN") %>%
  add_colcounts()

# Add screening counts row
lyt <- lyt %>%
  analyze("Screened", function(x, ...) {
    in_rows("Screened" = rcell(length(x), format = "xx"))
  })

# Add screen failure row
lyt <- lyt %>%
  analyze("Screen_Failure", function(x, ...) {
    in_rows("Screen Failure" = rcell(sum(x == "Screen Failure", na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx"))
  })

# Add enrolled row
lyt <- lyt %>%
  analyze("Enrolled", function(x, ...) {
    in_rows("Enrolled" = rcell(sum(x != "Screen Failure" | is.na(x), na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx"))
  })

# Build table
tbl <- build_table(lyt, adsl_screened)

# Add screen failure reasons as separate section
# Create a separate table for reasons
reason_lyt <- basic_table() %>%
  split_cols_by("TRT01AN") %>%
  add_colcounts()

for (reason in unique(screen_fail_reasons$DCSREAS)) {
  reason_lyt <- reason_lyt %>%
    analyze("DCSREAS", function(x, ...) {
      in_rows(reason = rcell(sum(x == reason, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx"))
    })
}

reason_tbl <- build_table(reason_lyt, adsl_screened %>% filter(DCREASON == "Screen Failure"))

# Combine tables
final_tbl <- rbind(tbl, 
                   rrow("Screen Failure Reasons"),
                   reason_tbl,
                   rrow("Enrollment Summary"),
                   rrow("Enrolled", 
                        rcell(screening_counts$Enrolled[1], format = "xx"),
                        rcell(screening_counts$Enrolled[2], format = "xx"),
                        rcell(screening_counts$Enrolled[3], format = "xx")),
                   rrow("Not Enrolled",
                        rcell(enrollment_summary$Not_Enrolled[1], format = "xx"),
                        rcell(enrollment_summary$Not_Enrolled[2], format = "xx"),
                        rcell(enrollment_summary$Not_Enrolled[3], format = "xx")))

# Output as RTF
rtf_file <- "t14-01-01_screening_summary.rtf"
rtf <- RTF(rtf_file, width = 8.5, height = 11, font.size = 10)
addTable(rtf, final_tbl, font.size = 10, row.names = FALSE, 
         col.just = "C", header.col.just = "C")
done(rtf)

cat("RTF file generated:", rtf_file, "\n")
